interpretation: The legacy current-effect projection is decisively noncongruent.

Exact primitive Pluecker data makes all three repeated mask-tree classes congruent as masks, but all three still have different coordinate-correlated child trees; individual endpoint coordinates cannot yet be discarded.
The full correlated and literal-address projections have zero disagreements only because all 48,237,501 classes are singletons. This is vacuous, not stabilization.
Depth-one reveals are rare in this finite selected panel, but rarity is evidence only and supplies neither a tail inequality nor a rank.
